title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 281.100 - Instructional courses, how conducted
text:
281.100.  Instructional courses, how conducted. — The director may, in cooperation with a land grant college or university or other public educational institutions, or a professional association or person representing the licensee's category of certification, publish information and conduct short courses of instruction in the areas of knowledge required for licensing or certification under the provisions of sections 281.010 to 281.115.
(L. 1974 S.B. 431 § 19, A.L. 1977 H.B. 665)
